Class-Barbarian 20 — Male Human Barbarian: 20
Strength: 20 (+5) Dexterity: 12 (+1) Constitution: 12 (+1) Intelligence: 15 (+2) Wisdom: 12 (+1) Charisma: 16 (+3)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Lawful Evil Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Charisma: 1; Intelligence: 1; Strength: 1; Wisdom: 2 Experience: 604997/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 40 Carry/Lift: 300/600
Ability Notes:
Boon Of Combat Prowess: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Fast Movement: +10 Speed; heavy armor negates
Grappler: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity)
Primal Champion: +4 Strength/+4 Constitution
Ability Boosts: 5 to distribute
Indomitable Might: Scores a minimum of 20 on Strength checks
Rage: Has advantage on Strength checks during rage
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: Epic Boon: 1; General: 5; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Barbarian (Barbarian Subclass)
Feats: Alert; Archery; Boon Of Combat Prowess; Defense; Grappler; Magic Initiate (Wizard); Two-Weapon Fighting Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Barbarian Features: Armor Training (Light; Medium; Shield); Barbarian Subclass; Brutal Strike; Danger Sense; Epic Boon; Extra Attack; Fast Movement; Feral Instinct; Frenzy; Improved Brutal Strike; Indomitable Might; Instinctive Pounce; Intimidating Presence; Mindless Rage; Path Of The Berserker; Persistent Rage; Primal Champion; Primal Knowledge; Rage; Reckless Attack; Relentless Rage; Retaliation; Save Proficiency (Strength; Constitution); Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Animal Handling, Athletics, Intimidation, Nature, Perception, Survival); Unarmored Defense; Weapon Mastery; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons) Acolyte Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma); Magic Initiate (Cleric); Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Barbarian Subclass: 1 selection
Epic Boon: +1 Epic Boon Feat
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skill Proficiency: Animal Handling; Insight; Perception; Religion; Survival
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +1 Insight: (wis) +7 Performance: (cha) +3
Animal Handling: (wis) +7 Intimidation: (cha) +3 Persuasion: (cha) +3
Arcana: (int) +2 Investigation: (int) +2 Religion: (int) +8
Athletics: (str) +5 Medicine: (wis) +1 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +1
Deception: (cha) +3 Nature: (int) +2 Stealth: (dex) +1
History: (int) +2 Perception: (wis) +7 Survival: (wis) +7
Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex)
Skill Notes:
Primal Knowledge: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from Animal Handling, Athletics, Intimidation, Nature, Perception, Survival)
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Primal Knowledge: Can use Strength for Acrobatics, Intimidation, Perception, Stealth, and Survival
Combat
Hit Points: 87 Initiative: +7 Armor Class: 12
Armor Training: Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: None Shield: None Weapons: Battleaxe (+11 1d8+5 S [2h d10]; Topple); Longbow (+7 1d8+1 P R150/600; Slow); Unarmed (+11 1+5 B); Whip (+11 1d4+5 S; Slow)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +6 Initiative
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +20
Defense: +1 Armor Class in armor
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +1
Improved Brutal Strike: Has increased Brutal Strike effects
Strength Attack Adjustment: +5
Strength Damage Adjustment: +5
Unarmored Defense: +1 Armor Class in no armor
Alert: Can swap initiatives with a willing ally
Archery: +2 ranged attacks
Boon Of Combat Prowess: Can treat an attack miss as a hit once per turn
Brutal Strike: Can forego Reckless Attack advantage on a Strength-based attack to inflict +2d10 HP weapon damage and 2 choices of: disadvantage on the target's next save and loss of opportunity attacks until the start of the next turn; a +5 bonus to the next attack on the target before the start of the next turn; a 15' push and optional move along with the target; -15 Speed until the start of the next turn
Extra Attack: Can make 2 attacks during an Attack action
Feral Instinct: Has advantage on initiative
Frenzy: Reckless Attack inflicts +4d6 HP to the first target each turn
Grappler: Can both Damage and Grapple with an unarmed strike once per turn, has advantage on attacks on a grappled foe, and can move at full speed with a grappled foe of Medium size or smaller
Instinctive Pounce: Can move 20' when entering rage
Intimidating Presence: R30' Can use a bonus action to inflict frightened (DC 19 ends) on targets for 1 min once per long rest; can expend uses of Rage for additional uses
Persistent Rage: Can recover all uses of Rage during initiative once per long rest and can continue raging without taking any action
Rage: Can enter a rage as a bonus action, gaining +4 damage with Strength weapons, for up to 10 min (attacking, forcing a save, or using a bonus action each rd extends the rage) 6 times per long rest, regaining 1 use after a short rest; heavy armor negates the benefits
Reckless Attack: Can suffer foe advantage on attacks to gain advantage on Strength melee attacks until the start of the next turn
Retaliation: Can use a reaction to make a melee attack on a successful adjacent attacker
Two-Weapon Fighting: Adds ability modifier to second weapon damage
Weapon Mastery: Can use the mastery properties of 4 chosen Simple or Martial Melee weapons
Save Proficiency: Constitution; Strength
Save: Charisma: +3; Constitution: +7; Dexterity: +1; Intelligence: +2; Strength: +11; Wisdom: +1
Save Notes:
Danger Sense: Has advantage on Dexterity saves
Mindless Rage: Has immunity to charmed and frightened during rage
Rage: Has advantage on Strength saves and resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage during rage
Relentless Rage: Can make a DC 10 Constitution save to retain 40 hit points when brought to 0 hit points during rage; each use adds 5 to the DC until a short rest
Magic
Attack: C: +7; W: +8 Spell DC: C: 15; W: 16
Magic Notes:
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Wizard): Knows 2 Wizard cantrips and can cast a chosen W1 spell once per long rest
Rage: Cannot cast or concentrate on spells during rage
Notes
Validation Errors:
Archery Feat: Requires fighting style feature
Defense Feat: Requires fighting style feature
Two-Weapon Fighting Feat: Requires fighting style feature
